report.status: ALL SEQUENCES PAUSED — PENDING CLIENT DATA REVIEW

overview.bookingTrackingNote: Bookings are not currently tracked in the MMai system. A separate booking source (e.g., Calendly) would need to be integrated for this metric.

sequences.name: Home Inspection Buyers Sequence
sequences.note: 585 contacts queued. Paused per client request. 64.44% open rate on 225 sent.

sequences.name: Real Estate Agent Referral Sequence
sequences.note: Highest open rate (91.73%). Paused per client request.

sequences.name: Real Estate Agent Referral Sequence - Apollo
sequences.note: Strongest click engagement (4.15% CR). Apollo-sourced. Paused per client request.

insights.title: Home Inspection Buyers — 585 Contacts Queued, Largest Pipeline
insights.detail: 665 total members with 585 not yet started — the single largest pipeline across all sequences. 145 unique opens at 64.44% open rate from 225 sends. Currently paused per client request; when reactivated this represents significant outreach potential.

insights.title: Exceptional Open Rates Across All Sequences
insights.detail: 607 unique opens across 732 total sends. Original referral leads at 91.73%, Apollo variant at 90.46%, and Home Inspection Buyers at 64.44% — all well above industry benchmarks.

insights.title: Apollo-Sourced Contacts Show Strongest Click Engagement
insights.detail: The Apollo variant delivers a 4.15% click rate (10 unique clicks) vs 0.75% on the original referral (2 clicks). The Apollo-sourced contact list is driving measurably higher engagement.

insights.title: All 3 Sequences Paused — Client Review In Progress
insights.detail: All sequences are currently paused at client request while performance data is being reviewed. Zero active outreach is occurring as of this report period.

insights.title: Zero Replies or Bookings — Messaging May Need Refinement
insights.detail: Across 732 sends with 607 opens, zero replies or bookings have been generated. Strong open rates with no downstream action suggests the CTA or message body may need adjustment.

insights.title: Bounce Rate Steady at 3% — Healthy Range
insights.detail: 22 total bounces (3.01% overall). Home Inspection Buyers at 6.22% is the highest, but both referral sequences are under 2%. No significant data quality concerns.

nextSteps.detail: Walk through open and click performance. 607 opens at strong rates deserve attention — discuss which sequences to prioritize when campaigns resume.
585 contacts queued and ready to start — the largest untapped pipeline. When reactivated, this sequence should be the top priority given its volume and 64.44% open rate.

nextSteps.action: Improve Messaging Using Best-Performing Email Approach
nextSteps.detail: The Apollo-sourced referral contacts show a 4.15% click rate vs 0.75% on the original sequence. Review what's working in the Apollo variant and apply those messaging elements to improve engagement across other sequences.
Bookings are not currently tracked in the MMai system. Adding Calendly or similar scheduling integration would provide end-to-end pipeline visibility.

notes.clientRequest: All 3 sequences paused per client request — client reviewing performance data before reactivating.
notes.bookingDisclaimer: Bookings are not currently tracked in the MMai system. All booking metrics show 0 — this does not mean no meetings occurred, only that they are not tracked here.
notes.dataAvailability: Open and click data from sequence performance screenshots. No LinkedIn/Prosp campaigns.
notes.ncNearRemoval: 3 Insurance/Industrial NcNear sequences (former business line) removed from this report.
